summary: TWO_COLUMN: Axes with always_redraw sigmoid curve σ(wx+b) driven by ValueTrackers w_tr + b_tr. RED dashed decision boundary at x=-b/w; GREY dashed y=0.5; YELLOW input-cursor + rider dot driven by x_tr. Three-phase tour: vary w (steepness) → vary b (shift) → sweep x. Live panel has w, b, x, z, σ(z).
